title: junellia seriphioides
intro: Junellia seriphioides, also known as "molle," is a plant species native to the Andean regions of South America, belonging to the Verbenaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant's health benefits include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valued remedy in folk medicine. Herbal preparations of Junellia seriphioides can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments in traditional Andean medicine.
